hero.subTagline: The financial platform where community lives inside.

problem.title: The Lonely Trader Problem
problem.p1: Decentralized finance solved custody. It did not solve isolation.
problem.p2: Five wallets. Three bridges. Seven protocols. Twelve token approvals. And at the end of all that, you sit alone in front of a chart.
problem.p3: The real context — who is trading, what others are watching, where conviction is forming — lives in Discord, Telegram, and X. Three apps open next to the DEX, none of them talking to each other.
problem.p4: Centralized exchanges understood this. Binance has chat rooms. Bybit has copy trading. But CEX social is surveillance social — your data, your patterns, your positions, all visible to the house.
problem.closing: The problem is not just fragmentation of capital. It is fragmentation of context.

thesis.title: The Inversion
thesis.intro: Pado does not bolt social features onto a financial product. It builds financial infrastructure where community is native to every action.

socialFiFailed.title: Why SocialFi Failed
socialFiFailed.content: Friend.tech attracted speculators who left the moment returns declined. InfoFi forced ROI calculations onto every conversation. The pattern is clear: injecting financial incentives into social environments creates friction, not engagement. When the social layer becomes the product, only mercenary capital shows up.

inversion.title: The Inversion
inversion.content: Pado starts with finance — real trading, real markets, real capital at risk. The social layer surfaces a shared context that already exists: people watching the same chart, taking the same risk, forming the same conviction. Finance is the reason to come. Community is the reason to stay.

financeFirstSocial.title: What Finance-First Social Means
financeFirstSocial.content: Chat embedded directly in trading pairs. Leaderboards that create shared context and friendly competition. Prediction markets that turn conviction into conversation. Every financial action has a social surface — not because engagement is the goal, but because trading alone is harder than trading together. No feed. No followers. No likes. Just markets and the people in them.

visitorJourney.title: The Visitor Journey
visitorJourney.content: Without social: a user tries the demo, clicks around, leaves. With social: a user opens a trade, notices the chat, sees someone call the same setup, checks the leaderboard, comes back tomorrow. The difference is not a feature — it is the difference between a tool and a place.

oneApp.title: One App, Not Many Protocols
oneApp.content: Spot trading, perpetual futures, lending and borrowing, prediction markets, lottery, staking, and payments — all under one account, one margin system, one risk engine. This is not the differentiator. This is the foundation that makes the differentiator possible. When capital flows freely and collateral works everywhere, the social layer has something real to gather around.

proof.title: Built, Not Promised
proof.subtitle: Everything below is live on Nasun Devnet today.

features.title: Live Chat
features.description: WebSocket-powered chat embedded directly in the trading interface. Signature-based authentication — your trading identity is your chat identity.

features.title: Testnet Leaderboard
features.description: On-chain trading data, real rankings. See who is performing and what markets they are active in.

features.title: Spot Trading
features.description: Full central limit order book powered by DeepBook V3. Real orders, real execution, real-time depth.

features.title: Prediction Markets
features.description: Binary YES/NO markets with on-chain resolution. Put conviction behind your forecast.

features.title: Weekly Lottery
features.description: On-chain lottery with Sui Random for provably fair draws. Pick your numbers, verify the result.

features.title: Smart Account
features.description: One-click onboarding via zkLogin. No seed phrase, no browser extension. Create an account in 30 seconds.

proof.statLine: 7 financial products. Live chat. Leaderboard. 0 seed phrases. All under one margin system.

blueprint.title: Where Pado Is Headed
blueprint.intro: Pado grows in three deliberate phases. Each layer builds on the one before it.

items.title: Chat Categories
items.description: Market-specific rooms, general discussion, and announcement channels — all inside the trading interface.

items.title: Leaderboard Competitions
items.description: Testnet trading campaigns with verifiable on-chain rankings. Compete openly, win transparently.

items.title: NFT Whitelist
items.description: Genesis NFT collection for early community members. Priority access through demonstrated participation.

items.title: Testnet Campaign
items.description: Structured onboarding program to build the initial community of active traders.

items.title: Perpetual Futures
items.description: Up to 20x leverage with real-time funding rates. The smart contracts are written and tested.

items.title: Lending & Borrowing
items.description: Supply assets to earn yield. Borrow against your portfolio. The protocol is deployed and the interface is ready.

items.title: Copy Trading
items.description: Follow top performers on the leaderboard with one click. Transparent track records, no hidden mechanics.

items.title: AI Agents
items.description: Risk Sentinel monitors portfolio health. Market Narrator translates movements into plain language. Strategy Simulator tests scenarios before committing capital.

items.title: Cross-Chain Vaults
items.description: Bring BTC and ETH into Pado through auditable, programmable vaults. Trade external assets with native performance.

items.title: Governance
items.description: Progressive decentralization toward full DAO-controlled protocol parameters.

blueprint.closing: Community first. Depth second. Scale third.

community.title: Community Is the Product
community.content: In web3, community forms around vision and early participation — not finished products. A prototype with a chat room where 50 believers are talking is more valuable than a polished DEX with zero community. Pado is designed for this sequence: vision and prototype attract the community. The community funds the next phase through NFT sales. NFT funding enables liquidity bootstrapping. Liquidity enables mainnet. Every step requires the previous one. The community is not a marketing channel — it is the funding mechanism, the feedback loop, and the reason the product works.

cta.title: Join the Next Wave
cta.body: Pado is live on Nasun Devnet. Open the app, make a trade, and say hello in the chat.
